label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 3

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL attacked inside final kilometer from GC group, won solo after KÄMNA caught from breakaway, took race lead.
tactical_patterns: BARDET attacked penultimate climb for 10km descent plus 9km finish runway, failed strategy reveals insufficient gap needed.
SEPÚLVEDA punctured on descent while leading trio, exposing risk of attacking before final climb on technical descents.
KÄMNA and CARUSO refused cooperation in leading break, tactical stalemate allowed GC chase to close decisive gap.
AYUSO and SOLER preemptively softened GC field before EVENEPOEL attack, team sacrifice created winning move conditions.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: attacked from select GC group inside 1km and soloed to win, took race lead by 5 seconds
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: only rider capable of following EVENEPOEL's late attack but chose not to, tactical restraint signals form confidence
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: neutral: refused to cooperate with CARUSO in break, caught near finish showing individual tactics backfired
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: dropped on penultimate climb before final 9km ascent, early weakness suggests GC challenge compromised
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: paced relentlessly allowing ROGLIČ and VINGEGAARD to rest, high-altitude domestique work already defining GC protection
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: repeatedly attacked to soften GC group before EVENEPOEL move, tactical maturity creating winning conditions for others
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: worked with AYUSO to soften field, finished in GC group same time showing strong climbing form
rider_signals.UIJTDEBROEKS Cian: negative: suffered and distanced on final climb, early-race struggles suggest Grand Tour debut difficulties
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: long-range attack from penultimate climb failed, caught before finale revealing insufficient firepower for solo efforts
rider_signals.SEPÚLVEDA Eduardo: negative: punctured on descent while leading, mechanical ruined strong breakaway performance
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: neutral: refused cooperation with KÄMNA in leading break, tactical standoff cost stage opportunity
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: finished in winning group 5 seconds down, early positioning suggests GC threat materializing
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: finished in winning group, strong positioning after team time trial weakness indicates recovery
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: finished in winning group benefiting from KUSS pacing, conserved energy while staying in contention
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: positive: finished in winning group to sit 3rd overall, young climber showing unexpected GC legs
